title: Duplicating a Monday Doc
excerpt: I am researching using Monday Docs for work instruction at a small run manufacturing company.  Is there a way to duplicate a Monday Doc from another to be used as the work instruction for a given serial number of a compo…

posts.author: drescheg (Guy Drescher)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am researching using Monday Docs for work instruction at a small run manufacturing company. Is there a way to duplicate a Monday Doc from another to be used as the work instruction for a given serial number of a component that we are building? I know there are templates for Monday Docs but I would rather leverage that for use at a higher level (ie a type of component rather than a part number).

In other words, I would like to use a Monday Doc templates for a type of component → Monday Doc master file for a part number → Monday Doc copy for a serial number. Ideally, I could do the last step from the api when a work order is created.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! Sorry for the late reply! If you still have questions about this, reach out to us at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to help set this up!
